name: Spoon Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Canned diced green chiles, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine corn, milk, shortening, eggs, cornmeal, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and drained chiles in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until well mixed.
3. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving hot.
